sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116038" key="w)ba/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠβ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n116038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divide the people into</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὠβαί,</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> foreg.</sense> </entryFree>
